goals.title: Scaffold Vercel-ready app
goals.objective: Create a Next.js TypeScript project with scripts, lint/test/build tooling, gitignore, and README placeholders.

goals.title: Build deterministic forecast domain
goals.objective: Implement typed macro basket, sample news events, korea-finance-mcp adapter boundary, deterministic scoring, evidence, uncertainty, time-series data, and unit tests.

goals.title: Build analyst dashboard
goals.objective: Implement event feed, event detail pages, impact cards, multi-horizon forecasts, evidence panels, uncertainty display, and charts.

goals.title: Add analyst notes and docs
goals.objective: Implement localStorage analyst notes and write English README plus linked README_ko with setup, scope, limitations, and public repo guidance.

goals.title: Verify and publish
goals.objective: Run tests/lint/build, perform cleanup/review gate, commit final state, create public GitHub repo eqr-nlp, and push main.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
